About Education Experience Projects

Hey, I'm Irving!

As a final-year Software Engineering student, I combine my academic background with a practical approach to developing modern and scalable web applications.
I have experience building real-world solutions for sectors such as healthcare and education, always prioritizing efficient architectures and secure data management.
My interest in diverse fields brings a multidisciplinary perspective to every challenge, allowing me to tackle complex problems with a holistic vision, adapting technology to the specific needs of each project.

GitHub LinkedIn eduardopoot17@gmail.com

Work Experience

  1. September 2025 - Present

    IT Systems & Software Engineer at Laboratorio del Sueño y Neurociencias - UADY

    Spearheaded the laboratory's digital transformation by migrating paper-based workflows to a custom web ecosystem, while simultaneously managing the technical infrastructure and maintenance of specialized medical devices.

    • Architected a cost-efficient web platform tailored to the lab's constraints
    • Managed the laboratory's IT ecosystem, performing maintenance on specialized hardware and configuring medical equipment software
    • Conducted staff training on software usage and equipment operations to ensure continuity.
  2. November 2024 - May 2025

    Software Engineering Intern at Facultad de Matemáticas - UADY

    Optimized critical administrative workflows by re-engineering scheduling algorithms and automating document management systems.

    • Re-engineered a Java-based scheduling algorithm to process XML and CSV data, successfully generating structured faculty timetables with accurate classroom and instructor assignments.
    • Developed an automated workflow using Microsoft Power Automate to manage the digital signing and approval process for faculty event documentation.
    • Transformed disorganized data sources into clean, actionable formats, significantly reducing manual administrative overhead for faculty staff.
  3. January 2024

    IT Support Intern at Facultad de Matemáticas - UADY

    Led a large-scale hardware optimization for the faculty's computer labs, modernizing the infrastructure to improve its performance.

    • Executed a massive hardware upgrade by replacing legacy HDDs with SSDs, significantly improving system responsiveness and boot times for faculty students.
    • Performed dual-boot OS installations and specialized software deployment for academic use.
    • Performed preventive and corrective maintenance to ensure high availability of computing resources for the entire student body.

Projects

Lab-Somno - A all-in-one solution for Laboratorio del Sueño y Neurociencias - UADY

Designed and developed a comprehensive web platform for the Sleep and Neuroscience Laboratory at UADY, specifically architected to meet complex clinical requirements under strict budgetary constraints. Beyond standardizing patient records and appointments, I engineered a specialized diagnostic module that automates the scoring of sleep quality scales. This transition from paper-based methods to a secure, digital ecosystem streamlined the clinical workflow, ensuring data accuracy and significantly improving the diagnostic process for healthcare professionals.

  • Astro
  • TypeScript
  • JavaScript
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Clerk
  • Supabase

Redes de Neurociencias - Educational Platform & Digital Identity

Designed and developed the official platform for 'Redes de Neurociencias', an association dedicated to neuroscience education and professional networking. I led the project from conceptual UI/UX design to a high-performance implementation using Astro and Tailwind CSS. The site features a centralized course catalog and specialized resources for healthcare professionals, focused on delivering a seamless, responsive, and SEO-optimized experience. The platform is currently in active development, with a roadmap focused on expanding its interactive modules and community features.

  • Astro
  • TypeScript
  • JavaScript
  • Tailwind CSS
